# Yuki Tanaka

My direct manager. Owns the [Q2 IC memo](../memos/acme-investment-memo.docx) deliverable. Generally hands-off but very particular about the executive summary and the [base case framing](../memos/acme-investment-memo.docx#base-case).

## Working style

- one-on-one mondays 9:30, standing — async otherwise
- wants thesis in 3 sentences before any work goes wide. *"if you can't say it in 3 sentences, you don't understand it yet"*
- ok with rough drafts but never ok with stale numbers
- decisive — usually decides within 24h of having the info
- escalation path for me when stuck
